review_title: Exceptionally Detailed SEO Insights That Inspire Total Confidence
description: Amazing team and very knowledgeable. Their webinars are great and always helpful with providing product roll outs. I am loving the additional functionality with AI insights they bring inside the tool.
author: Victoria S.
pros: I’m extremely pleased with JetOctopus. This tool has completely changed how I understand and manage technical SEO at scale. What really stands out is the depth of data insights. You can instantly see just how detailed and granular the analysis is, from crawl behavior to log file data making it easy to uncover issues and opportunities that other tools simply miss. The visualizations and segmentation make complex datasets easy to interpret, even for large, enterprise-level websites. JetOctopus doesn’t just show surface-level metrics; it gives you real, actionable insights into how search engines interact with your site. This level of transparency builds confidence in every SEO decision you make. Overall, it’s a powerful, reliable, and incredibly insightful platform. If you care about deep technical SEO and truly understanding your data, JetOctopus is absolutely worth it.
cons: The team is small but mighty, so just be patient with their support. They are a fantastic and great to work with. I highly recommend this tool and the team.

review_title: Jetoctopus is my SEO tool that allows me to manage my audits and improve SEO easily on a daily
author: Pep P.
pros: JetOctopus is a very comprehensive and easy-to-use SEO tool that offers a wealth of information and possibilities to manage and improve your SEO strategies.What I like most about JetOctopus highlights is the possibility to compare logs to know how search robots behave on the website, and to do it in an integrated way with other important tools like Google Search Console and Analytics G4. This provides a comprehensive view of website performance and helps identify potential indexing, crawling, and positioning issues.Another aspect that I use and value is being able to schedule alerts, these allow me to be aware of any change in the behavior of the search robot or performance.On the other hand, I have worked with OnCrawl or Botify and Jetoctopus is at the same level and at a very competitive price.Overall, JetOctopus is a highly recommended tool for anyone looking to improve their search engine rankings.
cons: Currently, jet octopus offers me everything I need in my day to improve the SEO of my projects

description: Overall, JetOctopus is a powerful, reliable, and ever-improving SEO platform that delivers exceptional value for money. It does everything you need it to do — and more — with a lean, efficient team behind it. If they were to invest more in UX design, customer success, and more structured communication around feature releases, they could easily become one of the leading tools in the enterprise SEO space.
author: Kairen-Jay K.
pros: JetOctopus is a tool that’s clearly evolving fast — the team actively listens to feedback and implements improvements at an impressive pace. I’ve made several feature suggestions and requests, and many were actioned within weeks, which really shows their commitment to customers. The pricing is also very fair compared to other enterprise-level SEO crawling and log analysis tools. You get a lot of functionality for the cost, making it an excellent value for both in-house teams and agencies.
cons: There are a few areas where JetOctopus could improve to reach its full potential. The interface can sometimes feel a bit clunky — it’s clear that the platform is built by people who deeply understand technical SEO, but it could benefit from more UX and design refinement to make insights easier to discover intuitively. Support, while very responsive via messages, isn’t as proactive as some competitors — there are no regular check-ins or success reviews with a dedicated CSM to ensure you’re getting the most out of the tool. Additionally, some of the educational content (videos and tutorials) feels a bit outdated, often repurposed from older webinars rather than concise, up-to-date walkthroughs. Lastly, since the team is based in Ukraine, occasional language quirks appear in the interface or documentation, but nothing that hinders usability.

review_title: Only JetOctopus is the answer for your crawls
author: Rajat J.
pros: First time I used JetOctopus, I couldn't believe some tool can crawl website at this speed. It was one of those moment like I was going to space but figuring out am I dead or alive? I thought they wouldn't be able to scale this thing for very long because I know how much a crawl is pain in the ***. Regularly checking posts and reading comments and new tool implementations like log file analyzer, which i didn't use yet, I am sure that one will be great tool too. A community grew up around JetOctopus and it seemed to me this Octopus is not going t stop spreading its arms. I am in the process of getting my budget aligned for this tool but I am excited to become a part of this community soon.
cons: Except Pricing I like everything in JetOctopus.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall, my experience with JetOctopus has been very positive. It’s a robust and advanced tool for technical SEO and data analysis, especially valuable for large or complex websites. An additional advantage is that the team clearly keeps up with industry trends and continuously expands the tool’s capabilities within the same subscription. New features such as AI-driven solutions and internal linking tools add real value without extra costs. Despite the crawl limits, JetOctopus offers strong insights that go well beyond traditional SEO tools.
author: Wojciech K.
pros: What I like most about JetOctopus is that it’s not just a crawler, but a full data analysis platform. The ability to integrate server logs, Google Search Console, and custom data makes it a powerful data-mining tool rather than just a standard SEO tool. This allows for much deeper and more advanced SEO analysis.
cons: The main downside for me is the page crawl limits, which can be restrictive when working with larger websites.

description: Very easy to use and offers insights that many other tools don't offer. Can be very helpful for both optimising your website and with real time log tracking diagnosing issues
author: Ryan B.
pros: Has all the features of more expensive products and the customer support is great
cons: Doesn't have as clean a look and interface as some more expensive options like Lumar
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A powerful cloud based crawler with (almost) you could wish for
description: Really satisfied with the product so far. It gives me a lot of capabilities that I was looking for, and at a very reasonable price. It's currently my cloud-based crawler of choice, and I use it along with Screaming Frog, for the few features that I need and JO doesn't currently offer.
author: Juan G.
pros: I love that all my projects are stored in the cloud and that therer are no limits in how many projects I can create. Also, the numer of urls I can crawl monthly is pretty high compared to most other crawlers in the market. I especially love the huge variety of filters I can apply to the data. and last but not least, the Google Search Console is excellent, one of the best ones I've seen yet in this kind of software.
cons: Mostly, the fact that neither your filters nor your columns settings in the data explorer can be saved, so you can later reuse them in other projects. That would save me a lot of time, but I'm still hopeful that they will implement that shortly. If they do, Jet Octopus will almost have no flaws in my opinion. Also, I would like to be able to easily export a CSV with all inlinks to internal 404 or 3xx codes, like Screaming Frog does. In my experience, everytime you play with the links data table, the software is not very responsive.

review_title: The best and fastest SEO crawler!
description: I usually use JetOctopus for technical analysis of news sites. These sites have a very large number of pages and this tool is the best and fastest way to analyse them.Another big advantage of JetOctopus is the ability to analyse logs.
author: Viacheslav V.
pros: I was impressed with the speed of this crawler. I can set up the process and get results in a matter of minutes. The dashboards are very informative, and it is easy to analyse the data.
cons: I have no particular comments to make. I didn't notice any disadvantages.

review_title: Very nice and easy tool do audit your site for SEO
description: Easy and cheap auditing tool for your or your clients' sites. Cheaper than competitors but works great.
author: Antoni L.
pros: Ease of use this tool to aaudit how your site is working for SEO (meta tags, http statuses, internal links, site speed and so on). You can then improve your site for search engine bots. Additional tool - log analyzer can help you to check what and how search engine bots index your site. It;s very helpful to use your crawl budget well.
cons: I'm using it only for crawling tests of our sites so I don't know any cons and lacks of this tool. It works as we need.

review_title: One of the best products for logs and crawling
author: Aleksandrs B.
pros: 1) Integration logs + crawl 2) Huge opportunity of customisation 3) Customer service 4) Price
cons: A little bit difficult UX, but it is ok for pro software and they are improving it everyday.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Desempenho e Eficiência do JetOctopus nas Análises Técnicas
description: O JetOctopus é uma ferramenta muito completa e fácil de usar no dia a dia. Os dados são apresentados com clareza e cada tema tem seu espaço bem definido. O fato de as informações virem separadas por área, como indexação, conteúdo, duplicação, linkagem e imagens, facilita muito as análises. O custo-benefício é excelente, especialmente quando comparado a outras plataformas de rastreamento. A interface é intuitiva e torna o uso simples mesmo em análises mais complexas. Outro ponto forte é o suporte, com atendimento rápido e eficiente, sempre pronto para ajudar a resolver dúvidas técnicas. No geral, é uma solução sólida para quem busca dados profundos e confiáveis sem complicar o fluxo de trabalho.
author: Adelvane F.
pros: - Interface intuitiva e fácil de usar, mesmo em análises complexas; - Estrutura organizada por áreas; - Rastreamentos rápidos e detalhados; - Visualização clara dos dados e relatórios bem estruturados; - Ótimo suporte ao cliente, com respostas rápidas e personalizadas; - Integrações úteis com ferramentas como Google Search Console e GA4; - Permite criar filtros e segmentações avançadas para análises específicas; - Ideal para auditorias técnicas completas e acompanhamento de performance; - Exportação de dados simples e compatível com planilhas e BI tools.
cons: Diante das análises técnicas realizadas na Cadastra, até o momento não foram identificados pontos negativos.

description: I am using JetOctopus over 6 months to crawl my website, making log analysis and understanding my website technical problems. You can fix all the tech problems and more you can create alerts for any problem that you want to alert instantly.
author: Berke O.
pros: JetOctopus has incredible perfect log analysis feature to analyze your log files for understanding the crawlers behaviours. It is helpful to understand your website and you can try to improve your website categories.
cons: JetOctopus is quite expensive rather than it's alternatives. It is fine but when you want to add more websites or users, you should have pay more money.

review_title: Powerful tool for a Technical SEO.
description: JetOctopus does three things well: it saves me time and money and enables me to uncover new opportunities to improve a website. Most SEO tools are usually okay at many things but not great at one thing; the fact that JetOctopus is great at what it does means it's a must-have for any Tech SEO.
author: Liam F.
pros: JetOctopus has managed to find the ultimate balance; they've created a powerful tool focusing on simplicity and usability. What's more, unlike many other tools, they don't spread themselves thin by trying to be the best at every aspect of SEO... Instead, they focus on what they are good at and continue to make it even better. As a Technical SEO who works with large and small websites, I thoroughly recommend JetOctopus if you want to make informed data-driven decisions for your clients.
cons: The dashboard would benefit from a design overhaul, with a fresh look and improved colour scheme, but this is just my personal preference.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
